data.acceptance:
1. The knot domain/view types can represent `scope_volume`, `scope_scale`, `scope_volume_score_confidence`, `scope_volume_stddev`, `scope_reliability`, `scope_reliability_score_confidence`, `scope_reliability_stddev`, `scope_reliability_band`, `scope_volume_result_id`, and `scope_reliability_result_id`.
2. Existing knots without scope metadata still load and display successfully.
3. Scope volume remains separate from any existing estimate/minutes concept.
